title: BeckmannLab/senescenceSTARprotocol: Release for Protocol for classifying cellular senescence from single-cell and single-nucleus RNA sequencing data

description: Protocol to classify senescent cells from single-cell or single-nucleus RNA sequencing data using gene expression activity scoring of a senescence gene set
